expectations.text: Fix 1: instructs removing push-to-talk from UIBackgroundModes
expectations.evidence: Response says 'DELETE the entire line: <string>push-to-talk</string>' and explains 'Since your app does not implement push-to-talk functionality, this background mode should not be declared.'

expectations.text: Fix 2: instructs adding NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription with a non-empty string
expectations.evidence: Response says 'Add this key to ios/Runner/Info.plist: <key>NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription</key><string>...[description]...</string>' with example values and notes the string must be non-empty

expectations.text: Explains that 'location' in UIBackgroundModes requires BOTH location description keys
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly states 'When location is declared as a background mode, iOS requires BOTH of these keys: NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription (you already have this) and NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription (MISSING)'

expectations.text: Mentions that warnings (yellow) still allow delivery but cause App Review rejection
expectations.evidence: Response states 'These are WARNINGS (yellow), not errors (red), but App Review will reject the build if they exist.' at the beginning of KEY POINTS
